item.title: Advanced Markdown Features
item.description: Exploring footnotes, tables, callouts, and more.

item.title: Dynamic OG image generation in AstroPaper blog posts
item.description: An overview of generating dynamic Open Graph images in Astro.

item.title: How to configure AstroScholar theme
item.description: A comprehensive guide on configuring the AstroScholar theme.

item.title: LaTeX Math Support in Astro Scholar
item.description: Demonstrating the new LaTeX math rendering capabilities using remark-math and rehype-katex.

item.title: Markdown Showcase: Code Blocks, Tables, Lists, and More
item.description: A reference post for the Academic Portfolio blog that demonstrates the markdown features supported by this Astro setup.

item.title: Optimizing Astro Builds
item.description: Tips and tricks to ensure your Astro site builds quickly and runs blazingly fast.
